course_description.overview: Europe's most beautiful cycling marathon over Albula, Maloja, and Splügen passes, a road marathon exceeding 3 hours with extreme terrain featuring frequent steep hills and long sustained climbs.

key_segments.name: Splügen Pass
key_segments.description: Challenging ascent in the Swiss Alps.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Extreme difficulty due to 4377 m elevation gain over 189 km with multiple high Alpine passes.

logistics.getting_there: Fly to Zurich or nearby airports, then transfer to Lenzerheide in Graubünden.
logistics.accommodation: Numerous options in Lenzerheide ski resort area.
logistics.registration_details: Opens December 12, 2025 at 12:00 noon; limited to 1500 participants.
logistics.bike_logistics: Standard road bike event; transport bike via car or train in Switzerland.
logistics.local_considerations: High Alpine weather variability; prepare for June conditions in mountains.

final_verdict.one_liner: Iconic Swiss Alps gran fondo with stunning passes and extreme challenge.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Strong road cyclists seeking epic high-altitude suffering and breathtaking scenery.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for those prioritizing scenery and climbing prestige over ease of access.
pro_tips: Register early on Dec 12, 2025 as spots fill fast.
Train for sustained high-altitude climbs over 2000m.
Check weather forecasts for June Alpine conditions.
Accommodate in Lenzerheide for easy access.

youtube_data.search_query: Alpen Challenge Lenzerheide gran fondo cycling Lenzerheide

videos.title: Alpen Challenge Lenzerheide
videos.description: Traumtag, Traumstrecke, Traumwetter, Traumteilnehmer: Die 17. Alpen Challenge​ Lenzerheide​. Radsport in Graubünden​ rockt. Sometimes the direct way to hapiness is a numer of switchbacks – see you 2017 August 6th...

videos.title: Alpen Challenge Lenzerheide – das Rennen 2018
videos.description: Epische Pässe, episches Wetter, ein episches Rennen. Die Alpen Challenge Lenzerheide geht in die Geschichte ein – trotz Felssturz am Splügen. Das Rennen über Albula- und Julierpass in Bildern.
